transitions.name: start_data_ingestion
transitions.description: Start the data ingestion process from the API.

criteria.name: scheduled_ingestion
criteria.description: Triggered by a scheduled job to ingest data.

process.name: ingest_raw_data
process.description: Process to ingest raw data from the specified API.

transitions.name: validate_ingested_data
transitions.description: Validate the ingested data for completeness and accuracy.
transitions.start_state_description: State after data ingestion is completed.

criteria.name: data_validation
criteria.description: Check if ingested data meets quality standards.

process.name: validate_data
process.description: Function to validate the ingested raw data.

transitions.name: log_ingestion_process
transitions.description: Log the details of the ingestion process.
transitions.start_state_description: State after data has been validated.
transitions.end_state_description: Logging of the ingestion process is complete.

criteria.name: logging
criteria.description: Log the details for audit and tracking.

process.name: log_process
process.description: Function to log ingestion details to the system.

transitions.name: notify_ingestion_complete
transitions.description: Notify stakeholders that the ingestion process is complete.

criteria.name: notification
criteria.description: Inform stakeholders about the completion of the data ingestion.

process.name: send_notification
process.description: Function to send notifications to relevant parties.
